name: Tex-Mex Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Solid white tuna in water, drained and flaked (1/2 cup)
Sliced green onions with tops (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tuna, olives, green onions, and celery in a medium bowl.
2. Mix Pace Picante Sauce, sour cream, and cumin thoroughly.
3. Pour the sauce mixture over the tuna mixture; toss lightly.
4. To serve, place taco shells on lettuce leaves or shredded lettuce.
5. Spoon the tuna mixture into the shells or individual serving plates.
6. Drizzle with additional Pace Picante Sauce and top with extra sour cream if desired.
